_metadata.for_match: Houston Dynamo FC vs Seattle Sounders FC

matchday_hook: Friday night under the lights at Shell Energy! The Dynamo are unbeatable at home this season (2-0) and Guilherme is on FIRE with 4 goals and 3 assists. Seattle rolls in banged up with 5 players OUT. This is the vibe check.

hot_posts.description: Posted '02.2026' with pregnant belly — baby girl has likely arrived but they're keeping it private
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The Bogusz baby girl was due in February. Wiktoria's last public post was captioned '02.2026' — the Inner Circle is waiting for the official reveal
hot_posts.suggested_tea: Wiktoria's been quiet since early March, which usually means one thing: new baby mode! The Bogusz baby girl was due in February and the couple has gone private. We're manifesting the announcement any day now.

hot_posts.description: Guilherme has been the breakout star of the season with 4 goals and 3 assists in just 4 matches
hot_posts.why_its_hot: Dream start to his MLS career — scored a brace on debut vs Chicago. Wife is pregnant with their second child, born in the US
hot_posts.suggested_tea: This man scored TWO goals in his MLS debut and hasn't stopped since. 4 goals, 3 assists. His wife is expecting their second child — about to be a Houston baby. The vibes are immaculate.

hot_posts.description: Scored a goal, conceded an own goal, AND got sent off in the same match vs FC Dallas
hot_posts.why_its_hot: Lived an entire telenovela in 90 minutes at FC Dallas. Peak chaos captain energy. Now SUSPENDED for the Seattle match.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: The captain wrote a whole screenplay at FC Dallas: scored to make it 3-2, then an own goal, then a second yellow and walked off. He'll be watching from the couch Friday night. Chaos king energy.

hot_posts.description: Got a straight red for fouling SON HEUNG-MIN at LAFC, then fined for not leaving the field fast enough
hot_posts.why_its_hot: Fouled one of the most famous players in the world and got fined for the dramatic exit. The audacity.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: This man's welcome to 2026 was fouling SON HEUNG-MIN and getting sent off for it. Then got FINED for taking too long to leave the field. The back line is a soap opera this season.

hot_posts.description: His phone lock screen is the 2026 World Cup logo on a black background. That's it. That's the motivation.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: USMNT midfielder with 35 caps, Gold Cup finalist, World Cup dreams — his lock screen IS the tournament
hot_posts.suggested_tea: Jack's whole personality right now is World Cup 2026. His lock screen is literally just the tournament logo on a black background. 35 caps and counting. The man is locked in.

roster_changes.detail: WAIVED on March 18, 2026. No longer on the roster. Remove from guide entirely.
OUT — lower body injury. Will not play vs Seattle.
OUT — lower body injury. Will not play vs Seattle.
SUSPENDED — second yellow card accumulation vs FC Dallas (Mar 21). Misses Seattle match.
NEW SIGNING — signed March 20, 2026 as free agent. USMNT defender, Colorado native, won Belgian treble with Royal Antwerp. Wife: Andrianna Vines.
NEW SIGNING — promoted from Dynamo 2 on March 20. 6'6" Argentine CB from Seton Hall. BIG EAST Defensive Player of the Year.

opponent_scouting.form_summary: Solid defensive run — 3 goals allowed in 6 road games, 1 in last 5. But 5 players OUT with injuries.

players_to_watch.name: Albert Rusnák
players_to_watch.partner_description: Wife, longtime partner. Two daughters including Ariana.
fun_facts: Father was also a pro footballer, became Manchester City scout
IG bio: 'A ❤️ T ❤️ A ❤️ T' — family first
players_to_watch.one_liner: Seattle's creative heartbeat. Controls tempo, breaks defenses with his passing, and his IG bio is all family love.
players_to_watch.source: Bayou City Soccer Three Players to Watch

players_to_watch.name: Paul Rothrock
fun_facts: Seattle native — hometown kid living the dream
Scored the 3rd goal in the Leagues Cup 2025 final win over Inter Miami
15K IG followers, always seems to play well vs Houston
players_to_watch.one_liner: Seattle's hometown hero. Always shows up against Houston. Scored in the Leagues Cup final vs Inter Miami.
players_to_watch.source: Bayou City Soccer Three Players to Watch

players_to_watch.name: Andrew Thomas
fun_facts: Took over from legendary Stefan Frei
Made the game-winning penalty save vs Club Puebla in Leagues Cup QF
players_to_watch.one_liner: Stanford grad who replaced a legend. Made the save that sent Seattle to the Leagues Cup semis.
players_to_watch.source: Bayou City Soccer Three Players to Watch
